'''Azarin''' was an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[General/Legends|general]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Azarin was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lafra]] in an accident involving a [[CSPL-12 projectile launcher/Legends|CSPL-12]] [[Projectile launcher/Legends|projectile launcher]]. Further investigation concluded that the weapon itself was not at fault, but that a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier's]] negligence in properly cleaning and maintaining the weapon caused the launcher to jam and ignite the canister.<ref name="ISB" />
